overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a winding dirt path through sunlit grasslands and forest edges. The scene transitions from a wooded trail with a wooden signpost to open meadows with tall grass, scattered trees, atmospheric mist, and wooden fence posts.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest edge trail with wooden signpost

events.description: passes the wooden signpost and continues along the winding forest path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path with swords on his back, moving away from the wooden signpost into the wooded area

entered.detail: weathered wooden signpost with directional arrows at the trailhead
winding dirt and gravel trail through the grass
dense dark green coniferous trees lining the left side of the path
tall green and golden grass growing alongside the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a wooden signpost on a forest trail, with Geralt walking away from it along a dirt path. Dense pine trees line the left side while tall grass grows on the right, with sunlight filtering through the canopy creating dappled shadows on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow path with scattered birch trees

events.description: emerges from dense tree cover into open grassland with wider sky visibility and distant atmospheric mist

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path as the environment opens up into a sunlit meadow with scattered white birch trees

entered.detail: white-barked deciduous trees with green foliage scattered across the meadow
large grey boulder sitting beside the path in the grass
atmospheric fog and haze visible in the valley between distant hills

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wide meadow with scattered birch trees replacing the dense pine forest. A large rock appears on the right side of the path, and atmospheric mist becomes visible in the distant valley as the sky opens up above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail with wooden fence posts

events.description: wooden fence posts become visible along the right side of the path marking the field boundary

agents.ego_description: walking through the open grassland passing wooden fence posts on the right, with distant misty hills ahead

entered.detail: weathered wooden posts and rails marking the edge of the meadow path

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through expansive open grassland with wooden fence posts now visible on the right. The large rock and birch trees fall behind as Geralt moves deeper into the meadow, with misty atmospheric haze persisting in the distant background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding dirt path that transitions from a sheltered forest trail into an expansive, misty meadow. It begins at a wooden signpost, following Geralt as he walks away from dense pine trees and dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy. As the path opens, the thick forest gives way to a wide meadow where scattered birch trees and a large rock appear, while the sky clears to reveal atmospheric mist in the distant valley. The scene then expands further into open grassland, with the birch trees falling behind as wooden fence posts emerge along the right side of the trail. Finally, the camera continues deeper into the meadow, maintaining a view of the persisting hazy horizon.
